final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster reimagining of 大话西游 (A Chinese Odyssey) in a 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: must be 35mm film with visible grain; needs a 1990s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a composition that foregrounds the embrace and places the distant figures in the background — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include all four figures:
  - 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss / embrace against a city wall (foreground)
  - 牛魔王 standing in the distance (background)
  - 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a city wall as the setting for the foreground embrace
Lighting/mood: needs a mood evoking 90s Hong Kong romantic-epic cinema — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a direction consistent with 90s Hong Kong film stock — exact palette and grading are yours
Materials/textures: must include visible film grain throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must read as a theatrical movie poster layout
Avoid:
